name: Lusitanians
declaringWar: You have made a grave mistake. The mountains remember every Roman who entered them. None returned.
introduction: I am Viriato, voice of the free tribes of Lusitania. We are not a nation built of stone and marble — we are born of the mountain wind. What do you want from us?
attacked: You attack us in our own hills? Then you will die in our hills. Every rock, every ravine, every forest path belongs to us.
defeated: They could not defeat us in battle. They bought our deaths instead. Remember that, when you celebrate your victory.
denounced: You have chosen poorly. The mountains have long memories.
neutralHello: The mountains are quiet today. Let us keep it that way.
hateHello: What do you want from us?
tradeRequest: Perhaps there is something of value to discuss.
uniques: When defeating a [Barbarian] unit, earn [0] Gold and recruit it
When conquering an encampment, earn [75] Gold and recruit a Barbarian unit
[-25]% Production when constructing [Military] units [in all cities] <before adopting [Professional Army]>
